Description: STING electrical assignment + balancing config. Voltage bands let BatchAssignCircuitsCommand decide whether a circuit and panel are 'electrically compatible' before considering slot space. Circuit grouping rules let related loads (kitchen sockets, emergency lighting) stay on one panel rather than scatter. Drop a project copy under <project>/_BIM_COORD/electrical_assignment.json to override; project values are merged on top of the corporate baseline (project wins on collision).

GroupingRules.Description: Kitchen sockets share one panel for ring-final assembly + RCD coordination.
BS 5266-1 — emergency lighting on a dedicated panel + DB so single-panel failure doesn't extinguish escape routes.
BS 5839-1 — fire alarm devices on a dedicated supply.
Comms / IT / BMS equipment grouped per room so a single UPS feeds them.

GroupingPolicy._notes: AllowFallbackToAnyPanel=true means a grouped load that can't fit a panel matching its group falls back to the standard greedy fit. Set to false for strict mode (group failures become unmatched in the report).
